/usr/bin/cc   -Wl,--no-as-needed CMakeFiles/leader.dir/src/main.c.o CMakeFiles/leader.dir/src/sys_commu_ipc.c.o CMakeFiles/leader.dir/src/sys_leader.c.o CMakeFiles/leader.dir/src/sys_master.c.o CMakeFiles/leader.dir/__/sys_share/sys_ctl.c.o CMakeFiles/leader.dir/__/sys_share/sys_share_daemon.c.o CMakeFiles/leader.dir/__/sys_share/sys_share_ipc.c.o  -o leader  -L/opt/etherlab/lib -lethercat -lpthread -lrt -lm
